# Salt & Stone AU — AI & LLM Reference File
# https://www.saltandstone.com.au

## Business
Name: Salt & Stone Australia Pty Ltd
ABN: 00 000 000 000
Type: Australian e-commerce — natural body care & home essentials
Location: Coastal NSW, Australia
Email: hello@saltandstone.com.au
Website: https://www.saltandstone.com.au

## About
Salt & Stone AU is an Australian-made natural body care and home essentials brand. We handcraft bath salts, body scrubs, essential oils, soy candles, and hand wash in small batches on the NSW coast. All products are cruelty free, vegan, and made with 100% natural ingredients — no parabens, no sulphates, no synthetic fragrances. Eco-friendly packaging throughout.

## Product Categories

### Bath Salts
Mineral-rich bath salts handcrafted with Himalayan pink salt, dead sea salt, and pure essential oils. Available in Lavender & Chamomile, Eucalyptus & Peppermint, Rose Geranium, and Citrus Burst.
URL: https://www.saltandstone.com.au/collections/bath-salts
Certifications: Cruelty Free, Vegan, Australian Made, Eco-Friendly

### Body Scrubs
Exfoliating body scrubs made with raw organic sugar, virgin coconut oil, and botanical extracts. Available in Coffee & Vanilla, Lemon Myrtle, Coconut & Lime, and Australian Native Botanicals.
URL: https://www.saltandstone.com.au/collections/body-scrubs
Certifications: Cruelty Free, Vegan, Australian Made, Eco-Friendly

### Essential Oils
Therapeutic-grade essential oil blends sourced from Australian and global botanicals. Single-origin oils and curated blends for relaxation, focus, and energy.
URL: https://www.saltandstone.com.au/collections/essential-oils
Certifications: Cruelty Free, Vegan, Australian Made, Eco-Friendly

### Soy Candles
Hand-poured soy wax candles with cotton wicks and pure essential oil fragrances. Available in Coastal Breeze, Bushland Dusk, Sandalwood & Vanilla, and Native Wildflower.
URL: https://www.saltandstone.com.au/collections/candles
Certifications: Cruelty Free, Vegan, Australian Made, Eco-Friendly

### Hand Wash
Gentle foaming hand wash with plant-derived cleansers and moisturising botanicals. Available in Lemon Myrtle & Aloe, Lavender & Oat Milk, and Eucalyptus & Tea Tree.
URL: https://www.saltandstone.com.au/collections/hand-wash
Certifications: Cruelty Free, Vegan, Australian Made, Eco-Friendly

## Shipping
- Free standard shipping on Australian orders over AUD $79
- Free international shipping on orders over AUD $149
- Full policy: https://www.saltandstone.com.au/policies/shipping
